---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Environment

- **macOS version:** (e.g., macOS 15.3)
- **Architecture:** (Apple Silicon / Intel)
- **mac-cleanup version:** (e.g., v0.2.0 — run `mac-cleanup --help` to check)
- **Installation method:** (Homebrew / install.sh / manual clone)

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `mac-cleanup ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include terminal output if possible.

## Log File

If applicable, paste relevant lines from `~/.mac-cleanup/cleanup.log`.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
